chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 1922 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection Nos.26 and 27 2. For orders on CMA No.5497/2023 3. For hearing of main case 10.10.2025 Mr. Ghulam Asghar Pathan, advocate for the applicant Under instructions, learned counsel does not press this reference application, which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 sub-section of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
